cour_recre.title: The Cour de Récré
cour_recre.text:
It's recreation.

You're with your best friend Tom.
And three other comrades.

Tom is trying to draw a picture on his notebook.

He's not very good at drawing.
He knows.
But he's still trying.

The others are watching.

You want to make everyone laugh.

So you say something.

**"Haha, it looks like a blob with legs. *

The others laugh.

Tom doesn't laugh.

He's closing his notebook.

regard_tom.title: Tom's Eye
regard_tom.text:
Tom is looking at you.

Just a second.

Not angry.

Something worse.

Disappointed.

He puts his notebook in his bag.
He's getting up.
He's going to sit somewhere else.

Alone.

The others have already forgotten.

Aikito was lying under the bench.
He's raising his head towards you.

**"Did you see his face? *

aikito_mots.title: What Aikito knows
aikito_mots.text:
Aikito sits in front of you.

**" Words make no noise when they are said. *
**"But they make a lot of noise in the head of the one who receives them. *

You look at Tom from a distance.

He's still drawing.
Alone.
Head down.

**"He's still drawing? You're asking.

** "Yes."** says Aikito.
**"But he draws more the same than before. *

You look better.

He closed his notebook on his knees.
Like hiding it.

choices.text: Waiting for the end of the recreation.

aller_parler.title: Go To Tom
aller_parler.text:
You're approaching Tom.

It's hard.

Your feet are slower than usual.

Tom is watching you arrive.
He's tightening his notebook.

You sit next to him.

Quiet.

Aikito looks at you both from a distance.
He's not saying anything.

It's yours.

choices.text: Don't say anything and stay there.

fin_recre.title: The Ring
fin_recre.text:
The bell rings.

Everyone goes back to class.

Tom walks by without looking at you.

Aikito walks next to you.

**"You wanted to wait for the right time. *
**"But the right time was before. *

In class, Tom sits away from you.

Normally you're side by side.

choices.text: Wait until the classes are over.

mot_papier.title: The Word
mot_papier.text:
You're tearing a piece of paper.

You're thinking a long time.

What do we write in these cases?

You're just writing:

I'm sorry. It wasn't good. *

You bend it.
You pass it to Tom.

He reads it.
He read it again.

He's not saying anything.

But he's looking at you.
Not like before.
Not yet.

Just... he's looking at you.

vraie_excuse.title: True Words
vraie_excuse.text:
Tom is looking at you.

**"Why did you say so then? *

You're thinking.

Really.

**"To make others laugh. *
**"It was stupid. *

Tom remains silent.

**"My drawing sucked anyway. * he says.

**"No. *

Tom looks up.

**"You were trying. * you continue.
**"It's different. *

Aikito stirs up the tail behind you.

fausse_excuse.title: Not Totally
fausse_excuse.text:
Tom lifts his shoulders.

**"A little. *

Quiet.

**"It was just for fun. * you say.

Tom looks away.

**"I know. *

Aikito approaches you slowly.

He whispers for you.

**"You apologized. *
**"But you didn't tell him you were wrong. *
**"It's not the same. *

silence_repare.title: Right there.
silence_repare.text:
You sit next to him.

Without saying anything.

Tom draws.

After a while,
He's turning the notebook towards you.

It's a dog.

Not perfect.
But we admit it's a dog.

**"Is that Aikito? You're asking.

**"I was trying.** says Tom.

Aikito is approaching.
He's looking at the drawing.
He's shaking his tail.

dessin_ensemble.title: The New Drawing
dessin_ensemble.text:
Tom opens his notebook.

He shows you the page.

There are lots of drawings.

Houses.
Animals.
People with round heads.

**"I'm trying to learn. * he says.
**"It's hard. *

**"You can continue to learn. * you say.
**"Even though it's not perfect. *

Tom's thinking.

*"Just draw with me. *
**"You're even worse than me. *

He smiles.

Really this time.

apres_cours.title: After the Courses
apres_cours.text:
On the way out, Tom is waiting for you.

A little back.

He's giving you back the piece of paper.

**"You could have just said it. *

**"I know.** you answer.
**"I didn't dare. *

Tom looks at his shoes.

**"My drawing was really a blob with legs? *

You hesitate.

**"A little. *

He laughs.

Not much.
But for real.

trop_tard.title: The End of Courses
trop_tard.text:
On the way out, Tom's already gone.

You're looking for him.

Aikito is next to you.

**" He went straight home. *

You stay on the sidewalk.

**"I'll talk to him tomorrow. You think so.

Aikito is looking at you.

**"The words we say remain for a long time. *
**"Apologies too. *
**"But they repair less well the next day. *

fin_repare.title: End — Words That Repair
fin_repare.text:
You're both drawing.

It's really not beautiful.

Aikito puts his head on the notebook.

Tom draws Aikito with a halo.

You draw Tom with a giant pencil.

You're kidding.

Really.

Aikito looks up at you.

**« Words can hurt. *
**"But good words can also fix. *
**"Just find the right ones. *

Tom put the notebook away.

**"Tomorrow we continue? *

**"Yeah. *

fin_lente.title: End — Almost As Before
fin_lente.text:
You're going home together.

You don't talk much.

But you walk side by side.

Aikito trottine between you.

**"Is it fixed? You ask Aikito down there.

**"Almost. * he says.
**"The words leave traces. *
**"But the traces fade over time. *

**"With time... It's a long time. *

** "Yes."** says Aikito.
**"That's why you better think before. *

fin_demain.title: End — The Evening Message
fin_demain.text:
In the evening, you send him a message.

Sorry about this morning. It sucked. *

You wait.

Long time.

Then three small points appear.

- Okay. *

Just *Ok. *

Aikito is lying next to you.

**"It's good you did it. *

**"But he just replied Ok..."**

** "Yes."** says Aikito.
**"The evening apologies do less well. *
**"Tomorrow, really talk to him. *
